title: Bitcoin back above $60,000, ETH, SOL recoup losses as AI stocks stage rebound
description: The token fell to about $59,000 before buyers stepped in, but the week's losses are steep across the board. A blowout Micron forecast lifted stocks and oil kept sliding, yet crypto did not follow.

title: XRP slides 2.8% as weak bounce keeps $1 support in focus
description: Sellers broke another support level on heavy volume, while the recovery failed to reclaim the zone that would ease downside pressure.

title: Bitcoin’s Woes Could Be Compounded by $10 Billion Options Expiry
description: Bitcoin is facing a massive options expiry that could put more pressure on a market already struggling with fading institutional demand and macroeconomic headwinds.

title: Bitcoin has a new line in the sand. Thursday’s core PCE could stress test it.
description: The market has found a new support level and it could be tested following Thursday's U.S. inflation data.

title: Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin goes live in Japan after regulatory approval
description: Japan's financial regulator cleared the U.S. dollar-backed token as a new category of payment instrument, letting SBI VC Trade offer it to institutions and retail. RLUSD remains small, at about $1.7 billion.

title: MemeCore's M token suddenly crashes 80% with no clear trigger
description: The token fell from nearly $3 to about $0.50 in hours, wiping out close to $3 billion in market value, with no exploit or announcement to explain it. Onchain investigator ZachXBT warned in April that M's price had been propped up by insiders.

title: CoinEx processed $3.8 billion in Iran-linked funds, acting as crypto gateway: TRM Labs
description: CoinEx has also interacted with terrorist organizations, including the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, and sanctioned Russian entities.

title: Live markets: Bitcoin, ether lead $1 billion liquidation losses as AI trade keeps going
description: A liquidation flush took bitcoin to its lowest since early June before Micron's blowout earnings and SK Hynix's U.S. listing plans steadied the AI trade that crypto had been sliding alongside.

title: Isabel Schnabel: Interview with Die Zeit
Forget max pain theory. Bitcoin is well below the $72,000 magnet going into $10 billion options expiry
description: The popular max pain theory isn’t working out as bitcoin trades far from the $72K level a day ahead of a $10 billion quarterly options settlement.

title: South Korea fines Bithumb for sharing user data overseas without consent
description: South Korea ordered Bithumb to pay roughly $136,000 in penalties for violating personal information protection rules.

title: ECB to integrate non-financial credit claim portfolios into general collateral framework, phasing out temporary measures

description: Today marks a major milestone in the modernisation of the UK's payments landscape, with the Retail Payments Infrastructure Board (RPIB) launching a consultation on the future design of the UK's next-generation retail payments infrastructure.

title: Thailand issues arrest warrant for Chinese businessman tied to $28 million illegal crypto mining probe: report
description: Chinese businessman Wang Yicheng was accused of involvement in illegal crypto mining operations that used $28 million worth of electricity.

title: Kraken expands OTC lending through an onchain warehouse facility with Maple
description: Maple’s lenders will provide a revolving line of funding to supply USDC liquidity for Kraken's over-the-counter borrowers.

title: Micron delivers blowout earnings, surges 16% and deals crypto bulls a blow
description: Micron Technology surged after blockbuster earnings and strong guidance, lifting AI memory stocks.

title: Half of UK wealth advisors say most clients’ crypto sits outside their oversight as 61% of European peers face firm restrictions: CoinShares
description: CoinShares survey found 52% of UK advisors report most clients' crypto exposure sits outside their oversight, with firm policy a key driver.

title: Bitcoin supply in loss reaches record high 10.83 million BTC
description: Almost 11 million bitcoin are now held at a loss, while long-term holders control a record 14.8 million coins.

title: SBI Holdings agrees to acquire Japanese crypto exchange Bitbank in $288.6 million deal
description: SBI Holdings agreed to acquire Bitbank for $288.6 million, with the transaction expected to close around October 2026.

title: Crypto relief rally fails to shake persistent bearish derivatives signal
description: A relief rally tied to recovering U.S. equities lifted BTC and ETH off weekly lows, but bearish derivatives positioning and negative CVD suggest the rebound may be fragile.

title: CoinEx denies claims it served as $3.84 billion gateway to sanctioned Iranian crypto firms
description: Blockchain analysts TRM Labs says CoinEx facilitated more than £3.8 billion in blockchain-traced flows with sanctioned Iranian crypto entities. CoinEx disputes the findings.

title: Bitcoin derivatives signal panic. A weak core PCE reading could trigger snapback.

Circle and Nomura join forces to target a $440 billion daily foreign exchange market in Japan
description: The stablecoin giant and the Japanese financial corporation plan to deploy cross-border foreign exchange settlements as early as next year.

title: ‘Waiting for buyers’: Bitcoin holds fragile $60K floor ahead of $10.6B quarterly expiry
description: Bitcoin fell to the low $60,000s ahead of a $10.6B June 26 quarterly expiry as $469M in ETF outflows and negative gamma weigh on sentiment.

title: Uniswap, Spark aim to build stablecoin FX market as banks, fintechs enter the industry
description: The protocols are building shared liquidity and trading infrastructure for a future with hundreds of competing digital currencies on blockchain rails.

title: Post-prison CZ says time behind bars didn't hurt the billionaire's business after Binance
description: The pardoned ex-CEO called prison a character-building "plus" as he's pursued a venture-capital career, despite his majority stake in the world's biggest crypto exchange.

title: Spark, Uniswap build stablecoin ‘FX Layer’ seeded with $150 million liquidity migration
description: Spark is establishing a "liquidity foundation" for the new pool by migrating $150 million from its USDS ecosystem to Uniswap v4.

title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE gains 10.1% as index rises
description: Bitcoin Cash (BCH), up 5.8% from Wednesday, joined Aave (AAVE) as a top performer.

title: Four arrested in Poland over crypto SIM-swap attacks; ZachXBT links ‘Merry’ to case
description: ZachXBT alleges threat actor 'Merry' is among those detained by Polish authorities in a crypto SIM swap and money laundering investigation.

title: Kraken sues crypto derivatives firm PowerTrade over 'misappropriated' funds claim
description: PowerTrade changed Kraken’s positive balance of around $7 million to a $2 million deficit via a series of unauthorized “corrections” related to trades that had expired or settled months earlier, according to a legal filing.

title: ‘Stablecoin’ Google searches down 54% as supply growth stalls after 2025 boom
description: The decline in search volumes this month coincides with aggregate stablecoin supply having reversed its 10-month expansion.

title: Bitcoin likely to fall another 30% to $44,000 by year-end, prominent BTC miner says
description: An early miner says Strategy's stock mNAV has fallen to 0.72, near the level that marked the last cycle's turn, and that bitcoin historically bottoms about six months after that signal.

description: Federal Reserve Board announces termination of enforcement action with Jiko Group, Inc.

title: Crypto for Advisors: Bitcoin: planning for inheritance
description: Your bitcoin isn’t just an asset; it’s a future. Ensure your loved ones can access it with a solid inheritance plan for when you're no longer here.

title: Bitcoin tumbles to new multi-year low of $58,000, but a short-squeeze setup emerges
description: Derivatives markets signal that betting on further slide in prices is getting overcrowded, setting up for a potential snapback.

title: Quant fund says bitcoin is near a major inflection point as rare onchain signals align
description: Hyperion Decimus' Chris Sullivan said four historically reliable indicators have aligned, leaving bitcoin one move away from confirming a major turning point.

title: Tether-pegged USDT0 stablecoin crosses $100 billion transaction volume milestone
description: USDT0, backed 1:1 by tethers, the largest stablecoin by market capitalization, is the third-largest holder of USDT.

title: Strategy has a 10-month cash runway for dividends, but retail investors are losing faith
description: STRC was marketed as a low volatility income product designed to trade near $100, and its sharp decline has undermined investor trust.

title: BlackBerry is making a massive comeback as an 'uncrashable' software layer for AI and robotics
description: BlackBerry's stock is surging after the company's massive earnings beat and is pivoting into becoming a critical component of the AI and robotics boom.

title: Bitcoin rout leads Strategy’s STRC to slide 26% below par as MSTR shares hits 16-month low
description: For the past year, Strategy has been issuing and tapping preferred securities like STRC to raise capital for additional bitcoin purchases.

title: Sophon sunsets its Layer 2 blockchain, moves to Base to build consumer apps
description: Sophon, which has raised $70 million in total funding, is shutting down its Layer 2 blockchain and moving to Base to build consumer apps.

title: a16z-backed crypto firm rebrands, shifts focus to solving AI’s global copyright headache
description: The startup formerly known as Story Protocol raised $140 million to secure internet rights and is now building an audit layer for data consent, licensing, and provenance for tech firms.

title: Coinbase-incubated Base blockchain suffers ‘Unsafe Head Stall’ interrupting block production
description: Deposits and withdrawals have also been affected, while transactions are delayed or stalled, according to Base's status page.

title: Michael Saylor’s Misfiring Funding Model Jolts Bitcoin Traders
description: Fears that Michael Saylor’s Bitcoin buying machine is beginning to seize up are spilling across the crypto market, fueling the latest leg of Bitcoin’s selloff and exposing cracks in one of the financial structures that has underpinned demand for the world’s largest cryptocurrency over the past two years.

title: Kraken in talks to buy 15% stake in DeFi lender Aave at $385 million valuation
description: The DeFi lender is rebuilding after the fallout from April's KelpDAO exploit sparked a multibillion-dollar exodus of deposits despite Aave itself not being hacked.

title: The Crowd was incredible last night, packed to the brim — At least 45,000 people were there, with a huge Television and online audience. I wish we were able to have an even larger area, which we will be able to do on July 4th when I’ll be speaking again. The airplane flyovers and music were fantastic. Everybody stayed right until the end of my Speech because they loved hearing about a truly successful America. See you again on July 4th! President DONALD J. TRUMP

title: Coinbase's Base blockchain resumes after two-hour outage disrupted network
description: The incident temporarily halted transaction processing on one of Ethereum's largest layer-2 networks.

title: Trillion-dollar asset manager Invesco looks to plant a flag in tokenized stablecoin reserve sector
description: The fund will invest primarily in U.S. Treasuries, repo agreements, and cash equivalents to maintain a stable $1 net asset value.

title: Senate races to advance crypto legislation in July as housing bill turmoil threatens timeline
